title: Last Guest at Sunset
description:
A Murder at Sunset ChateauEveryone at Sunset Chateau is lying about something.

Question suspects, compare alibis, and untangle a web of contradictions, hidden relationships, and dangerous motives.

Every conversation reveals another piece of the truth — but the killer is counting on you accusing the wrong guest.

Use observation, interrogation, and deduction to uncover the murderer before they disappear into the night.

Each investigation draws from a growing cast of more than 37 Hollywood personalities — actors, producers, directors, musicians, journalists, executives, publicists, socialites, and industry outsiders.

Every case selects 8 suspects with shifting relationships, hidden motives, conflicting stories, and dangerous secrets.

Some will lie to protect themselves.

Some will protect each other.

One of them is a killer.

Investigate the TruthQuestion suspects who lie, deflect, contradict each other, or protect dangerous secrets.

Follow the EvidenceUse the Strategy Board to visualize the relationships, contradictions, motives, locations, and timelines surrounding the investigation.

Follow the connections between suspects, motives, locations, and testimony to uncover the truth.

Every Case ChangesCases are procedurally generated with different killers, motives, methods, suspect combinations, and clue trails.

Every new case changes the relationships, motives, and hidden tensions between guests, creating a different path to the truth each time you play.

Think Like a DetectiveBuilt for players who want to think like a detective—reading people, testing theories, and committing to a conclusion.

Weigh motive, means, and opportunity before making one final accusation.

Make the Final AccusationWhen you believe you have solved the case, identify:

• The killer
• The motive
• The murder method
• The critical timeline
• The crime scene

Choose carefully.

A wrong accusation could condemn the innocent while the real killer walks free.
description_short: Investigate a replayable Hollywood murder mystery where everyone has something to hide. Question guests, uncover contradictions, and identify the killer before they escape justice.
